tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies Intercom API token and connectivity.

tools.name: get-workspace
tools.description: Get information about the connected Intercom workspace: name, region, timezone, and the authenticated admin.

tools.name: search-conversations
tools.description: Search conversations in Intercom with filters by state, date range, tags, and assignee. Returns paginated results with conversation metadata.

createdAfter.description: Unix timestamp — only conversations created after this time

createdBefore.description: Unix timestamp — only conversations created before this time

tools.name: get-conversation
tools.description: Get the full details of a specific Intercom conversation by ID, including all messages, notes, tags, and assignee.

tools.name: reply-conversation
tools.description: Reply to an Intercom conversation as an admin. Can send a public reply to the customer or add a private internal note.

body.description: The reply text (plain text or HTML)

type.description: "comment" sends a public reply; "note" adds a private internal note (default: comment)

adminId.description: The admin ID to reply as. If omitted, uses the token owner.

tools.name: assign-conversation
tools.description: Assign an Intercom conversation to a specific admin or team.

adminId.description: Admin ID to assign the conversation to

teamId.description: Team ID to assign the conversation to

tools.name: update-conversation
tools.description: Update a conversation state (open, close, snooze) or priority in Intercom.

snoozedUntil.description: Unix timestamp — required when state is "snoozed"

tools.name: tag-conversation
tools.description: Add or remove tags from an Intercom conversation.

tools.name: list-admins
tools.description: List all admins (agents) in the Intercom workspace with their IDs, names, emails, and seat status.

tools.name: list-teams
tools.description: List all teams in the Intercom workspace with their IDs, names, and member counts.

tools.name: list-tags
tools.description: List all tags defined in the Intercom workspace. Useful for finding tag IDs before tagging conversations.

tools.name: get-contact
tools.description: Get details of an Intercom contact (user or lead) by their Intercom ID.

tools.name: search-contacts
tools.description: Search Intercom contacts by email, name, or phone number.
